title: Appending to Files
description: Add content to existing files without overwriting.

slides.title: Appending to Files
Appending Examples
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
file_put_contents('log.txt', '[' . date('Y-m-d H:i:s') . '] User logged in\n', FILE_APPEND);
$handle = fopen('log.txt', 'a');
fwrite($handle, 'Another log entry\n');
fclose($handle);
?>

quizData.question: Which flag is used with file_put_contents to append?
quizData.explanation: FILE_APPEND makes file_put_contents add to the end.
